# DwellPraise (Dwell Praise)

> One Gospel, Many Platforms. A Christian ministry founded by Remoir and Angela, cultivating dwelling places for God through structured, intentional content. Originating from a WhatsApp group called "Tales" in 2023, shaped through Worship Harvest mentorship, and launched as DwellPraise Ministries in May 2026.

## Origin Story
- 2023: The Tales Seed — Remoir starts a WhatsApp group called "Tales" and sends 360 Bible stories in a year. Bishop Isaiah Mbuga prophesies: "You guys are the Next Generation."
- 2024: Worship Harvest & Aethelwine — Remoir aligns with Worship Harvest Nairobi under Papa Melo's mentorship. He launches the Aethelwine Family Pseudo Missional Community with 5 people.
- 2025: The Hidden Season — Aethelwine grows to 50 members. The YMG strategy is revealed during a 50-hour prayer marathon. Remoir is instructed to disband the fellowship and transitions into lay service at WH Ongata Rongai.
- January 23, 2026: The [Encounter Foundation](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/give) is formed by founders Remoir and Angela, rooted in a deep conviction about generosity and the 10/20/70 formula.
- May 5, 2026: DwellPraise Ministries officially begins — WhatsApp, Substack, YouTube, and social platforms go live.
- June 1, 2026: MakeMission is initiated — a for-profit entity to fund the Gospel and develop skills and talents for the mission.

## The Name
Our Lead Founder's name, Remoir, was given by Papa Melo — Pastor Morris Melchizedek, Location Pastor of Worship Harvest Ongata Rongai. From that day, he has carried that name as a covering and identity for the mission.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/): Main hub and introductory portal.
- [About](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/about): Our mission, vision, and core ministry goals.
- [Media Hub](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/media): Video and audio resources spanning multiple platforms.
- [Give](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/give): Empowering businesses and relieving urgent needs through structured generosity.
- [Contact](https://dwellpraise.gt.tc/contact): Get in touch with the DwellPraise ministry team.

## What We Do
DwellPraise is a digital ministry that distributes the Gospel across multiple platforms including YouTube, Substack, Instagram, Bluesky, X (Twitter), and WhatsApp. We create sermons, worship content, podcasts, and community stories. MakeMission is our for-profit arm that funds the Gospel and develops skills and talents.
